notes: Outcome milestone #13 — Octant Vault APY >= 5% sustained 30 days; due 2026-06-30.
Epic #463. Hard deadline: contract freeze 2026-05-30; mainnet deploy 2026-06-30.
Policy layer ONLY — MultistrategyVault + YieldResolver are untouched in Q2 (decision 1). This preserves Octant audit heritage.
Presets are immutable; new ID per version (decision 7). 48h timelock on operator-initiated preset switches (decision 8).
Audit engagement bundled with SessionKeyValidator.sol from agent-messaging-channels (one audit firm, one contract freeze).
Mutation test target on RebalancePolicy: 95%+ (stretch 99%, decision 12). This is a p0 quality bar.
Aggressive preset deferred to Q3 (decision 4). Auto-migrate existing vaults to Conservative on upgrade (decision 6).
Emergency withdraw only after 14 days of vault pause (decision 10).
Afo deferred this out of active product work on 2026-04-26. Keep as June implementation/backlog, not part of the April closeout push.

ui.handoff_note: Admin PresetPicker (48h timelock countdown + cancel) + VaultPositionCard wiring for buffer %, queued withdrawal, preset badge. bun run lint:vocab on all copy (no leaderboard / FOMO / growth-hacking language).

state_api.handoff_note: Extend useVaultOperations + add useVaultPreset in @green-goods/shared. Hats V2 role wiring (PRESET_ADMIN / OPERATOR / PAUSER) via existing admin surfaces.

contracts.handoff_note: PresetRegistry (UUPS) + RedemptionQueue + RebalancePolicy (pure library) + Morpho Metamorpho + Ondo USDY strategy adapters. Mutation score >=95% on RebalancePolicy (stretch 99%). Audit-bundled with SessionKeyValidator; contract freeze 2026-05-30. Upgrade path auto-migrates existing vault to Conservative in single atomic tx.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Blocked on audit report delivery. Storybook + Chrome MCP spot-check of preset picker + queued-withdrawal UX; lint:vocab on yield copy; audit report saved to artifacts/.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Runs only after audit is green. Re-run mainnet-fork invariants + Gelato keeper dry-run + confirm RebalancePolicy mutation score >=95%. Snapshot mainnet APY at deploy + 30 days for AC-9 evidence before closing outcome milestone #13.

history.note: Hub created from superpowers spec + plan. Epic #463; outcome milestone #13. 12 decisions locked: policy-layer-on-top approach, Conservative + Balanced Q2 scope, immutable presets, on-flow + Gelato rebalance, 48h switch timelock, 14-day emergency-withdraw gate, external audit before 2026-05-30 contract freeze, 95%+ mutation score on RebalancePolicy.

brief.md + eval.md + status.json scaffolded; spec.md migrated from docs/superpowers/specs/ (legacy folder deleted). plan.todo.md spec link rewired to ./spec.md. Audit engagement bundled with agent-messaging-channels SessionKeyValidator. plan-hub.mjs validate green.
Moved feature hub from active to backlog
